Hero.name: DIEGO NAVARRO
Hero.description_1: Specialist in building scalable digital systems and development workflow automation. Eight years of experience closing the technical gap between high-fidelity design and software architecture.
Hero.description_2: Technical stack: React/TypeScript for frontend, Python for backend logic, Docker for infrastructure. Arch Linux development environment.

About.label: [01 — ABOUT]
About.heading: ABOUT
About.subtitle: Solutions Architect with Graphic Design background, specialized in Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) optimization.
About.bio_1: Professional focus on modern frontend engineering and infrastructure management. Background in Graphic Design enables precise translation of visual specifications into technical implementation.
About.bio_2: Track record: 150+ projects delivered. Implementation of custom architectures and automation systems with documented 30% increase in operational efficiency.
About.bio_3: Technical stack centered on React component development, service orchestration via Docker, and Linux environment administration (Arch/CachyOS).

Works.label: [02 — PROJECTS]
Works.heading: SELECTED PROJECTS
Works.description: Selected projects representing technical architecture and execution.

BlogSection.label: Thoughts & Articles
BlogSection.heading: BLOG
BlogSection.description: Exploring the intersection of technology, design, and digital strategy.

Vision.label: [05 — PRINCIPLES]
Vision.heading: WORK PRINCIPLES
Vision.description: Production deployment is the primary metric. Optimization for maintainability, performance, and system reliability.
Vision.tab1_content: Production deployment is the primary metric. Optimization for maintainability, performance, and system reliability. Code is developed considering long-term maintenance and team collaboration as core requirements.
Vision.tab2_content: Interface implementation requires solid architectural foundations. Components, APIs, and workflows designed as integrated systems, ensuring scalability from initial release through product growth.
Vision.tab3_content: Process optimization through CI/CD, automated testing, and design-to-code pipelines. The documented 30% efficiency improvement results from systematic process optimization.

Marquee.text_1: SOLUTIONS ARCHITECT • DESIGN ENGINEERING • SYSTEMS AUTOMATION •
